title: Zero-sum scope categories erase nonzero leaf subtrees
evidence: Reproduced. Category-level bare aggregate filter erases zero-sum categories with nonzero signed leaf subtrees (the R6 bucket keep-rule then drops the bucket). Fix: subtree-aware category predicate. #T1

title: Scope slice predicates ignore effective first-match ownership
evidence: Reproduced. Scope slice: predicates match raw rules, not first-match effective ownership -> owner credited for frames it never owns. Fix: memoized frame-level first-match resolution. #T2

title: Python silently accepts a misspelled top-level slices key
evidence: Reproduced. Python defaults missing top-level slices key to [] -> slice: typo silently discards config; Rust rejects. Fix: require the key in Python. #T3

title: A present facts-v2 summary can be empty and evade cross-validation
evidence: Reproduced. summary: {} evades cross-validation (every member individually optional). Fix: present summary requires all four members, both languages. #T4

title: Mixed global and local --output options use the first value instead of the last
evidence: Reproduced. Global --output hoist appends after local tokens -> global wins over later local, violating last-wins. Fix: hoist only when no local occurrence, both languages. #T5

title: Both protobuf decoders reject legal unknown group fields
evidence: Reproduced. Legal deprecated group wire types 3/4 in unknown fields rejected instead of skipped. Fix: skip balanced groups in both decoders. #T6

title: Scope loading bypasses duplicate and reserved slice validation
evidence: Reproduced. Scope-config slice loading bypasses duplicate/default/reserved validation (analysis-layer checks only run in slices projection). Fix: validate on load, both languages. #T7

title: Rust's numeric-backreference rewrite miscounts parentheses inside regex comments
evidence: Reproduced. Backref rewrite counts '(' inside (?#comments) as capture groups -> valid pattern still compile-rejected. Fix: comment-aware scanner. #T8

title: Bottom slice-filter rescue ignores attribute-rule precedence
evidence: Reproduced. Bottom slice-filter rescue matches ANY descendant rule targeting the slice instead of the first-match winner. Fix: precedence-aware rescue, both languages. #T9

title: Python silently treats an explicit empty --output as no option
evidence: Reproduced. Python truthiness treats --output '' as absent (artifact to stdout); Rust rejects empty value. Fix: empty output path is a validation error in Python. #T10

title: The --show-paths flag has no observable effect
evidence: Reproduced. --show-paths is inert in both languages (filenames always emitted); parity test compares two no-ops. Fix: honest resolution per sketch (document/pin or implement), bytes preserved. #T11

title: Unknown top-level scope keys silently disable configuration sections
evidence: Reproduced. Unknown TOP-LEVEL scope config keys silently ignored (owenr typo drops the owner section). Fix: top-level allowlist, both languages. #T12

title: Repeated protobuf period_type messages are replaced instead of merged
evidence: Reproduced. Repeated protobuf period_type occurrences replace instead of merge (proto3 singular-message merge semantics). Fix: merge fields across occurrences, both decoders. #T13

title: Facts-v2 accepts a primary index inconsistent with the declared default metric
evidence: Reproduced. primary_value_index bounded (R7) but not tied to the documented selection from default_sample_type/value_types -> contradictory artifacts select the wrong metric. Fix: recompute and require equality, both languages. #T14
